task.title: Support -h help flag for every relayfile command

events.content: Intercept help flags at the top-level dispatcher: Intercept help flags at the top-level dispatcher

raw.question: Intercept help flags at the top-level dispatcher
raw.chosen: Intercept help flags at the top-level dispatcher
raw.reasoning: This lets -h/--help work before subcommand validation, credential loading, or network calls, and keeps aliases consistent.

events.content: Help handling is centralized and focused CLI/manual checks pass; broad Go tests are running before commit.

retrospective.summary: Added centralized -h/--help handling for relayfile root commands, command groups, subcommands, and aliases, with regression coverage for every CLI help path.
